broker.name: Broker Address
broker.description: Kafka bootstrap server address, e.g. 127.0.0.1:9092. Multiple brokers separated by commas.
broker.description_zh: Kafka bootstrap server 地址，如 127.0.0.1:9092。多个 broker 用逗号分隔。

topic.name: Default Topic
topic.description: Default Kafka topic for publishing data.
topic.description_zh: 发布数据的默认 Kafka 主题。

format.name: Upload Format
format.description: JSON format of reported data. Values-format splits data into values and errors. Tags-format puts tags in a single array.
format.description_zh: 上报数据的 JSON 格式。Values-format 下数据分为 values 和 errors。Tags-format 下数据放在一个数组中。

upload_err.name: Upload Tag Error Code
upload_err.description: When data tag collection reports an error, report the tag error code.
upload_err.description_zh: 点位采集报错时，上报点位错误码。

batch-max-messages.name: Batch Max Messages
batch-max-messages.description: Maximum number of messages batched in one produce request.
batch-max-messages.description_zh: 一次发送请求中的最大消息数量。

linger-ms.name: Linger (ms)
linger-ms.description: Delay to wait for more messages before sending a batch. Larger values increase throughput at the cost of latency.
linger-ms.description_zh: 发送前等待更多消息的延迟。更大的值可提高吞吐量但增加延迟。

security-protocol.name: Security Protocol
security-protocol.description: Protocol used to communicate with Kafka brokers.
security-protocol.description_zh: 与 Kafka Broker 通信时使用的安全协议。

ssl-ca.name: CA Certificate
ssl-ca.description: CA certificate for verifying the broker's certificate.
ssl-ca.description_zh: 用于验证 Broker 证书的 CA 证书。

ssl-cert.name: Client Certificate
ssl-cert.description: Client certificate for mutual TLS authentication.
ssl-cert.description_zh: 用于双向 TLS 认证的客户端证书。

ssl-key.name: Client Private Key
ssl-key.description: Client private key for mutual TLS authentication.
ssl-key.description_zh: 用于双向 TLS 认证的客户端私钥。

message-timeout-ms.name: Message Timeout (ms)
message-timeout-ms.description: Local message timeout. This is the maximum time librdkafka may use to deliver a message (including retries).
message-timeout-ms.description_zh: 本地消息超时时间。librdkafka 用于投递消息（含重试）的最大时间。

acks.name: Acknowledgements
acks.description: Number of broker acknowledgements required. -1 = all in-sync replicas, 0 = no ack, 1 = leader only.
acks.description_zh: 要求的 broker 确认数。-1 = 所有同步副本，0 = 无需确认，1 = 仅 leader。

client-id.name: Client ID
client-id.description: Client identifier string passed to Kafka broker for logging and monitoring.
client-id.description_zh: 传递给 Kafka broker 的客户端标识，用于日志和监控。
